scene: A solid horizontal rectangular {{material}} block with sharp 90-degree corners, spanning {{block_width}} cells wide by 1 cell tall, that completely fills the canvas edge-to-edge with zero empty space. A bold centered {{centerpiece_type}} in a flat graphic style. The block is a perfect rectangle — every pixel of the canvas is covered by the block surface, reading as one cohesive piece.

subjects.size: approximately 50% of tile height, centered horizontally
subjects.interaction: sole focal element anchoring the horizontal block

style: flat vector, bold cel-shaded, high-contrast graphic style
lighting: simple two-tone cel shading with highlight on upper-left and shadow on lower-right

background.details: NO background layer. The solid rectangular {{material}} block itself occupies 100% of the canvas. No margins, no gaps, no empty pixels anywhere.

composition: centered symmetrical layout; {{centerpiece_type}} anchors the middle; the entire {{block_width}}:1 rectangle reads as a single unified block, not {{block_width}} separate tiles; generous negative space around the icon
medium: digital vector-style illustration with minimal texture
details: the block is a sharp-cornered rectangle filling 100% of the canvas — no rounded corners, no curved edges
every single pixel of the image is part of the block surface — zero empty space anywhere
no outer margin, border, or gap of any color
outermost 8-10% of block darkens using the base {{material}} tone only
edge darkening is part of the block surface, not a background
fully opaque image with no transparency
limited to 2-3 tonal shades for clarity
the block must read as ONE cohesive horizontal piece, not {{block_width}} repeated squares
effects: surface-integrated vignette using multiply shading of {{material}} color
usage_notes: CRITICAL: The rectangular block MUST fill every pixel of the image. Sharp 90-degree corners. No rounded corners. No empty space. No background visible anywhere. The block surface covers the entire canvas from edge to edge, corner to corner. The design must NOT look like {{block_width}} identical tiles side by side - one unified horizontal piece with a centered focal point.
negative_prompt: {{block_width}} separate square tiles placed side by side
